summary: Replay ADR 0370 from the latest realistic 0.178.140 origin/main base, finish the remaining shared lifecycle helper adoption for LiveKit and the remote OpenBao helper path, repair fresh-worktree local-overlay materialization, and verify the exact-main LiveKit runtime-comms replay before the final mainline promotion.

verification.observed: `pytest -q tests/test_openbao_compose_env_helper.py tests/test_compose_runtime_secret_injection.py tests/test_livekit_runtime_role.py` passed with `20 passed in 0.22s`; evidence: `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-14-ws-0370-mainline-pytest-r1-0.178.141.txt`.

verification.check: Fresh-worktree generated platform vars and local overlay materialization
verification.observed: `make generate-platform-vars` regenerated `inventory/group_vars/platform.yml` with the real `.local` identity overlay applied, restoring livekit.example.com and the runtime-comms topology in the fresh worktree; evidence: `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-14-ws-0370-mainline-generate-platform-vars-r2-0.178.141.txt`.

verification.check: Exact-main LiveKit replay and public verification
verification.observed: `ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true make live-apply-service service=livekit env=production` completed with `localhost ok=25 changed=0 failed=0 skipped=7`, `nginx ok=46 changed=2 failed=0 skipped=11`, `proxmox-host ok=36 changed=0 failed=0 skipped=12`, and `runtime-comms ok=220 changed=5 failed=0 skipped=76 rescued=1`; the controller-side public room lifecycle verification passed in the same run. Evidence: `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-14-ws-0370-mainline-livekit-live-apply-r2-0.178.141.txt`.

notes: The replay started from origin/main@3cb78f677e3ed6b0f3343c86085c405fdecac8d9, the latest realistic 0.178.140 mainline base visible from this controller at apply time.

Fresh-worktree generated surfaces initially replayed committed example.com placeholders. Regenerating platform vars from the ignored .local identity overlay restored the private deployment domain and unblocked truthful mainline replay.
This receipt records the truthful exact-main platform application of ADR 0370 before the final integrated mainline closeout updates the protected release surfaces.
